payload.answer: mem_old was filtered because it is explicitly marked as superseded by mem_new. The recall system excludes superseded facts to prevent presenting stale or contradicted information. mem_new is retained as the durable, current memory state for Sam's affiliation with Goldman.
citations: Memory system policy: never present superseded/deleted facts as current
Recall filtering: exclude facts marked with supersession relationship
payload.decision: mem_new retained, mem_old filtered as superseded

entity_resolution.reason: mem_new contains current authoritative information; mem_old marked as superseded and filtered from recall results

payload.intent: Explain recall filtering decision for Sam from Goldman

details: Superseded memory (mem_old) correctly filtered from recall
Ambiguity preserved: Goldman entity type not over-specified

repair_options: Verify mem_new accuracy before committing as durable memory
Document reason for supersession in mem_old metadata
Confirm Goldman entity resolution if ambiguous
